title: ChatMessageEntry and BlobUploadResponse use String for typed ID fields
description: ChatMessageEntry has message_id, chat_id, sender_id as plain String fields. BlobUploadResponse has account_id and blob_id as String. All of these are non-empty server-assigned identifiers that should use the Id type. Using String bypasses Id's non-empty invariant (enforced in deserializer and Id::new), making it easy for code to accidentally accept or produce empty strings. SseEvent::Typing.chat_id/sender_id and SseEvent::Presence.contact_id are also String but should be Id. Fix: change String to Id in all four push/SSE/blob types.
